# SailorOps Color Palette

## Core Colors
| Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|------|--------|
| Deep Navy | `#071423` | Primary backgrounds |
| Blueprint Navy | `#0D2238` | Panels, docs |
| Ops Blue | `#4CC3FF` | Accents, highlights |
| Steel Silver | `#D7E2F0` | Text, icons |
| Soft White | `#F5F7FA` | High‑contrast text |

## Support Colors
| Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|------|--------|
| Graphite | `#1A1F27` | CLI backgrounds |
| Signal Green | `#00C47A` | Success |
| Warning Amber | `#FFB84D` | Warnings |
| Alert Red | `#FF4D4D` | Errors |

## Usage Rules
- Use Deep Navy as the default background.
- Ops Blue should be used sparingly for emphasis.
- Steel Silver is the default text color on dark backgrounds.
